AI.conclusion: Goal2Pixel证明了将VLN-CE重构为像素级目标定位是一种高效且有效的范式，大幅降低了VLM推理开销，同时提升了导航性能，为视觉-语言导航提供了新的研究方向。

title: When Hard Negatives Hurt: Bridging the Generative-Discriminative Gap in Hard Negative Synthesis for Retrieval
summary: Hard negative mining has become the dominant strategy for training retrievers, yet it faces intrinsic limitations: negatives are bounded by corpus availability, selected by retriever score rather than diagnostic value, and increasingly contaminated by false positives as the retriever improves. LLM-based synthesis offers a principled alternative, where negatives that are unconstrained, targeted, and free from false positive risk. But we show that naively incorporating generated negatives into contrastive learning often degrades retrieval performance. We identify and formalize the root cause as a generative-discriminative gap: LLM generation optimizes for fluent, plausible text, while contrastive learning demands strategic violations of relevance at the decision boundary. Our analysis reveals two compounding failure modes: discriminative-agnostic generation, where the LLM lacks an explicit model of query information needs and defaults to generic or topic-drifted text that provides no contrastive signal; and source-dependent shortcuts, where distributional artifacts enable the model to distinguish negatives by origin rather than relevance, causing gradient drift that actively corrupts optimization. To close this gap, we propose CausalNeg consisting of two main modules: (1) CoT-guided counterfactual perturbation for data construction: decomposes why a document satisfies a query into explicit information requirements, then surgically violates individual requirements to construct negatives with controlled, interpretable hardness. (2) Query-view entropy maximization during training: disperses generated negatives across the similarity spectrum, minimizing the mutual information between source identity and similarity scores to suppress shortcut exploitation. We make our code publicly available at https://github.com/mzhangzhicheng/CausalNeg.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出CausalNeg方法，通过因果推理和反事实扰动生成高质量负样本，解决生成式负样本在对比学习中的退化问题。
AI.motivation: 硬负样本挖掘存在局限性：受语料库限制、缺乏诊断价值、随检索器提升而出现误报污染。LLM合成负样本虽可规避这些问题，但直接使用会降低检索性能，根源在于生成-判别鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出CausalNeg框架：(1) CoT引导的反事实扰动：分解文档满足查询的信息需求，针对性违反以构建可控硬负样本；(2) 查询视角熵最大化：分散生成负样本在相似度谱上的分布，抑制来源捷径。
AI.result: 有效解决了生成式负样本导致检索性能退化的问题，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果视角弥合生成-判别鸿沟，为LLM合成负样本在检索任务中的应用提供了原则性方案。

title: When Jokes Cross the Line: Analyzing Regular Humor and Dark Humor in YouTube Shorts
summary: Video platforms such as YouTube have reshaped how users engage with entertainment and information, emphasizing brief, highly engaging content such as Shorts. Within this ecosystem, certain content occupies a gray area where it remains allowed but may still have unintended negative effects on some audiences. To study this problem, we introduce TwistedHumor, a dataset of 1,211 YouTube Shorts paired with 33,041 related comments, with hand annotations for humor presence, humor type, harm, topic, rhetorical devices, and stand up context. Beyond dataset creation, we present a multi view analysis of how humor and harm appear in short form social media. Using LLooM based concept induction over video descriptions, we find that dark humor frequently clusters around themes of critique, coping, awkwardness, and identity expression rather than appearing as a single uniform category. We further analyze audience response through linked comments and show that regular humor is associated with more positive sentiment, while dark humor receives more mixed, neutral, and sometimes more toxic reactions. Finally, we evaluate large language models against human annotations and find that they perform better on stand up comedy compared to shorter jokes. Together, these results position TwistedHumor not only as a new benchmark, but as an empirical study of the gray area between humor and harm in short form video, highlighting the need for context aware moderation and more robust multimodal evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TwistedHumor数据集（1,211个YouTube Shorts及33,041条评论，含手动标注），从多视角分析短视频中幽默与伤害的灰色地带，发现黑色幽默常围绕批评、应对、尴尬和身份表达等主题，且观众反应比常规幽默更复杂、更带毒性；评估表明大语言模型在单口喜剧上表现优于短笑话。
AI.motivation: 短视频平台（如YouTube Shorts）中存在内容虽被允许但可能对部分观众产生负面影响的灰色地带，现有研究缺乏对此类幽默与伤害的细粒度、多视角分析。
AI.method: 构建TwistedHumor数据集（1,211个视频+33,041条评论，手工标注幽默类型、伤害程度、主题、修辞手法等）；使用LLooM进行概念归纳分析视频描述；通过评论分析观众情绪与毒性；评估大语言模型与人类标注的一致性。
AI.result: 黑色幽默常聚类于批评、应对、尴尬和身份表达等主题；常规幽默关联更积极的情感，黑色幽默则引发更混合、中性乃至更毒性的反应；LLM在单口喜剧上表现优于短笑话。
AI.conclusion: TwistedHumor不仅是新基准，更是对短视频中幽默与伤害灰色地带的实证研究，强调需要上下文感知的内容审核和更鲁棒的多模态评估。

title: What to Test Next: Interpretable Coverage Gap Discovery in Driving VLMs
summary: Driving vision-language models (VLMs) must accurately understand scenes across diverse conditions defined by Operational Design Domains (ODDs), yet verification remains sparse: many slices are missing, making empirical failure rates unreliable. We propose SliceScorer, a deterministic scoring rule for missing-slice recommendation that combines (i) an exposure-based coverage prior to prioritize rare, under-tested regions, and (ii) a neighbor-failure prior that propagates risk from similar tested conditions. SliceScorer is deliberately simple - interpretable, auditable, and conservative - properties essential for safety-critical validation. For stress testing beyond the declared ODD, we embed SliceScorer within SliceNav, an LLM-orchestrated verification pipeline where the model interprets developer queries to select relevant operators (triage, scoring, acquisition, evaluation) and vocabulary extensions, composing verification workflows while keeping all scoring deterministic and auditable. Experiments on three driving VLMs (WiseAD, DriveMM, Cosmos-Reason2-2B) show that SliceNav surfaces high-risk coverage gaps more effectively than prior slice-discovery methods while maintaining diverse recommendations across the condition space. Ablations confirm both scoring components contribute, and qualitative analysis demonstrates end-to-end workflows from developer query to targeted evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出SliceScorer评分规则和SliceNav验证流水线，用于自动驾驶VLM在ODD条件下的缺失切片推荐与压力测试，实验证明比现有方法更有效地发现高风险覆盖漏洞。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶VLM在不同ODD条件下缺乏充分的验证，大量条件切片缺失导致经验性故障率不可靠。
AI.method: 提出SliceScorer（结合曝光覆盖先验和邻居故障先验的确定性评分规则），并嵌入SliceNav（LLM驱动的验证流水线，支持查询解析、算子选择和工作流编排）。
AI.result: 在WiseAD、DriveMM、Cosmos-Reason2-2B三个驾驶VLM上，SliceNav比现有切片发现方法更有效地发现高风险覆盖漏洞，且保持推荐多样性。
AI.conclusion: 消融实验确认两个评分组件均有贡献，定性分析展示从查询到评估的完整工作流。

title: FAiT: Frequency-Aware Inverted Transformer for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
summary: While Transformer-based architectures have established themselves as a dominant paradigm in Multivariate Time Series Forecasting (MTSF), their core self-attention mechanism inherently functions as a low-pass filter, systematically smoothing out high-frequency signals vital for sharp local changes. Recent advancements have increasingly incorporated frequency-domain operations to address this bias, however, most existing designs rely on fixed spectral bases and apply sequence-wise (uniform) modulation, implicitly assuming a time-invariant frequency response. This overlooks a key property of real-world series that their spectral characteristics often evolve over time, making uniform modulation insufficient for capturing fine-grained temporal dynamics. To tackle these limitations, we propose FAiT, a Frequency-Aware inverted Transformer. Specifically, FAiT rectifies the spectral bias internally through Inverted Attention, which interprets the attention map as a learnable low-pass operator and constructs a dedicated complementary high-pass branch by inverting the attention matrix to recover attenuated transient signals. Furthermore, FAiT introduces Dynamic Temporal-Frequency Modulation (DTFM), which synthesizes instance-conditioned weights to adaptively re-calibrate the energy of spectral sub-bands, enabling fine-grained control over evolving multi-scale patterns. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate that FAiT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Transformer-based and frequency-enhanced baselines, while maintaining computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 针对Transformer在多元时间序列预测中作为低通滤波器平滑高频信号的问题，提出FAiT模型：通过反演注意力矩阵构建互补高通分支恢复瞬态信号，并引入动态时频调制实现自适应频谱子带能量重校准。
AI.motivation: Transformer的自注意力机制本质上是低通滤波器，会平滑掉对局部突变至关重要的高频信号；现有频域方法使用固定谱基和序列级统一调制，忽略了真实时间序列频谱特征随时间演化的特性，无法捕捉细粒度时序动态。
AI.method: 1) 反演注意力（Inverted Attention）：将注意力图解释为可学习的低通算子，通过反演注意力矩阵构建互补高通分支，恢复被衰减的瞬态信号；2) 动态时频调制（DTFM）：合成实例条件权重，自适应地重校准频谱子带能量，实现对演进的多尺度模式的细粒度控制。
AI.result: 在多个广泛使用的基准数据集上，FAiT持续优于最先进的基于Transformer和频域增强的基线方法，同时保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: FAiT通过内部修正频谱偏差和自适应时频调制，有效解决了Transformer在多元时间序列预测中对高频信号平滑的问题，验证了实例条件动态调制在捕捉时变频谱特征上的有效性。

title: Pave-GRPO: Beyond Instantaneous Guidance through Principled Average Velocity Decomposition
summary: Post-training via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for aligning flow-based generative models with human preferences. However, the iterative denoising nature of flow models incurs substantial costs when generating group rollouts for policy-gradient updates, compelling existing methods to train with extremely few denoising steps. This temporal sparsity severely restricts preference optimization: reward feedback can only reach a handful of stages per trajectory, leaving the vast majority of intermediate denoising steps without direct supervision and thus compromising alignment granularity. To address this, we propose Pave-GRPO, which reformulates the GRPO objective through Principled average velocity decomposition. Rather than generating expensive high-step rollouts, we maintain efficient few-step group sampling but decompose each coarse transition into an equivalent ensemble of finer sub-trajectories spanning multiple intermediate timesteps. This propagates reward feedback to a denser set of temporal stages for more comprehensive preference alignment without additional generation cost. This design offers two benefits: (i) zero-cost horizon expansion: through the direct reuse of piece-wise group samples and their associated rewards, Pave-GRPO significantly broadens the effective optimization scope under fixed sampling budgets; and (ii) comprehensive temporal supervision: by equivalently decomposing an instantaneous velocity target into a multi-timestep ensemble, it distributes reward signals across more intermediate stages of the denoising process, enabling finer-grained and more thorough preference optimization. Extensive experiments validate that Pave-GRPO effectively advances preference alignment across different reward settings, offering comprehensive performance enhancement.

AI.tldr: Pave-GRPO通过原则性的平均速度分解，在不增加生成成本的情况下，将稀疏的奖励反馈传播到更密集的时间阶段，实现了流式生成模型的细粒度偏好对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO方法因流模型迭代去噪成本高昂，只能使用极少去噪步数进行训练，导致奖励反馈仅能覆盖少数时间阶段，中间步骤缺乏监督，对齐粒度不足。
AI.method: 提出Pave-GRPO，通过原则性平均速度分解，将粗粒度的单步过渡等价分解为多个中间时间步的细粒度子轨迹集成，在不增加生成成本的前提下将奖励信号传播到更密集的时间阶段。
AI.result: 实验表明，Pave-GRPO在不同奖励设置下均有效提升了偏好对齐效果，实现了全面的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Pave-GRPO通过零成本的时间范围扩展和全面的时间监督，在固定采样预算下显著拓宽了有效优化范围，实现了更细粒度的偏好优化。

title: Conditioned free-energy density of proteins using unbalanced solutions to constraint satisfaction problems
summary: We show that computing the log-partition function (free-energy) of conditioned inhomogeneous Curie--Weiss spin Hamiltonians reduces to an unbalanced $2 \to 1$ norm computation, and design a polynomial-time SDP algorithm for this problem with a lower bound proof for the amount of unbalance achieved. Applied to the protein Ubiquitin, the framework starts from a known crystal structure, explores alternative backbone conformations across the free-energy landscape, and identifies flexible regions of the protein while preserving its native secondary structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将条件非均匀Curie-Weiss自旋哈密顿量的对数配分函数（自由能）计算转化为非平衡2→1范数计算问题，并设计了多项式时间SDP算法，在蛋白质Ubiquitin上验证了其识别柔性区域的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效计算条件非均匀Curie-Weiss自旋系统的自由能，且蛋白质柔性区域识别需要更精确的物理建模方法。
AI.method: 将自由能计算转化为非平衡2→1范数问题，设计多项式时间SDP算法并给出非平衡程度的下界证明；以已知晶体结构为起点，探索自由能景观中的替代主链构象。
AI.result: 在蛋白质Ubiquitin上成功识别了柔性区域，同时保留了其天然二级结构。
AI.conclusion: 该SDP框架能有效结合物理建模与计算效率，为蛋白质构象分析提供了新工具。

title: CanonCGT: Reference-Based Color Grading via Canonical Pivot Representation
summary: Reference-based color grading aims to reproduce the tonal mood and lighting of a reference while preserving color harmony and scene structure. Existing photorealistic and filter-based methods often produce unstable tone mappings -- over-shifting or inconsistently retaining colors -- leading to unnatural results. We propose CanonCGT, a two-stage framework built on a canonical pivot -- a style-neutral intermediate representation for stable color mapping. The first stage canonicalizes the input by removing intrinsic tonal bias, and the second color-grades it to match the reference style. A dual-phase training scheme, DP-CGT, combines supervised preset learning with self-supervised refinement on unpaired photographs. CanonCGT delivers photorealistic and tonally consistent results across diverse datasets, surpassing state-of-the-art methods in stability and visual fidelity. Our codes are available at \href{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}

AI.tldr: CanonCGT 是一个两阶段的参考图像色彩分级框架，通过“规范支点”实现稳定的色调映射，结合监督学习和自监督微调的双阶段训练，在多个数据集上实现了优于现有方法的视觉效果和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于照片真实感和滤镜的色彩分级方法存在色调过度偏移或颜色保留不一致的问题，导致结果不自然，亟需一种更稳定的色调映射方法。
AI.method: 提出 CanonCGT 两阶段框架：第一阶段通过消除输入图像的内在色调偏差进行规范化，第二阶段将规范化的结果映射到参考风格。同时设计了 DP-CGT 双阶段训练方案，结合监督预设学习和自监督微调。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现了照片级真实感和色调一致性，在稳定性和视觉保真度方面超越了当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: CanonCGT 通过引入规范支点和双阶段训练，有效解决了现有色彩分级方法色调不稳定的问题，是一种高质量、高鲁棒性的参考图像色彩分级方案。

title: FreqLite: A Lightweight Frequency-Decomposed Linear Model with Adaptive Reversible Normalization for Robust Long-Term Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Long-term time-series forecasting needs models that are accurate yet efficient enough for commodity hardware. Lightweight linear forecasters are remarkably strong in this regime, yet they leave two openings: reversible instance normalization (RevIN) de-normalizes the entire horizon with a single lookback statistic, which is inaccurate under non-stationarity, and time-domain trend/seasonal decomposition relies on a fixed, non-adaptive filter. We present FreqLite, an ultra-lightweight, channel-independent frequency-decomposed linear forecaster: a learnable, lossless, partition-of-unity spectral filter splits the input into bands that are forecast by per-band linear heads and, unlike low-pass-truncation approaches, the high-frequency band is retained and modeled. FreqLite is the best lightweight model on the standard long-term forecasting benchmarks and, at long lookback (L=336), attains a lower average error than a PatchTST Transformer (0.3244 vs. 0.3587 MSE) while using 4x fewer parameters, 2.2x less memory, and 2.2x less time per epoch on a single 4 GB laptop GPU; although modest in magnitude, its improvements are statistically significant under paired Wilcoxon tests across all matched cells (p < 1e-5). We further introduce Adaptive Reversible Instance Normalization (A-RevIN), a regime-adaptive reversible normalization that strictly generalizes RevIN (recovered exactly when its gate is closed), engages under non-stationarity, and reduces to RevIN without harm on stationary data. We validate this on both a real strongly non-stationary dataset (ILI, up to ~5% MSE reduction) and a controlled synthetic drift sweep in which A-RevIN's benefit and its learned gate both rise monotonically with injected non-stationarity. Every component is independently ablatable (Linear and RLinear are special cases of FreqLite), and all results are reproducible on commodity hardware.

AI.tldr: FreqLite是一个超轻量级的频域分解线性预测器，通过可学习的无损频谱滤波器将输入分解为多个频带并分别预测，在长期时间序列预测中比PatchTST Transformer更准确且效率更高；同时提出A-RevIN，一种自适应可逆实例归一化方法，在非平稳数据上优于RevIN。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级线性预测器存在两个问题：(1) RevIN使用单一回溯统计量对整个预测区间进行反归一化，在非平稳条件下不准确；(2) 时域趋势/季节分解依赖固定的非自适应滤波器。需要更高效且能处理非平稳性的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出FreqLite模型：采用可学习的无损划分统一频谱滤波器将输入分解为多个频带，每个频带由独立的线性头预测，高频带也被保留并建模。同时提出A-RevIN：门控自适应归一化机制，在非平稳时激活自适应操作，平稳时退化为标准RevIN。
AI.result: FreqLite在标准长期预测基准上是最优的轻量级模型。在L=336的长回溯下，平均误差(0.3244 MSE)优于PatchTST(0.3587)，且参数量减少4倍、内存减少2.2倍、每epoch时间减少2.2倍。改进在统计上显著(p<1e-5)。A-RevIN在ILI数据集上实现约5%的MSE降低，在合成数据上性能提升与注入的非平稳性单调正相关。
AI.conclusion: FreqLite证明了频域分解策略在轻量级长期预测中的有效性，A-RevIN为非平稳时间序列提供了一种自适应归一化方案。所有组件均可独立消融，且结果可在普通硬件上复现。

title: Edge-directed geometric partitioning for versatile video coding
comment: This paper has been published in IEEE ICME
summary: To improve the coding performance, geometric partition (GEO) was proposed for the upcoming VVC standard. GEO provides 140 partition candidates. The index of optimal GEO mode needs to be signaled explicitly. Considering different structural characteristics of different CUs and the correlation between spatial adjacent blocks and temporal collocated blocks, we propose a GEO mode prediction strategy by constructing a Most Probable Mode (MPM) list to reduce the overhead of GEO index and improve coding efficiency. Based on the observation of the high correlation between the partition mode and object boundaries, an edge-directed geometric partition scheme is proposed to construct the MPM list according to spatio-temporal edge information. The proposed method provides an objective BD-rate gain of 0.58% and 1.00% on average for RA and LDB configurations compared to VTM-6.0. Besides, it also promotes the visual quality of object boundaries.

AI.tldr: 针对VVC标准中的几何分区(GEO)模式，提出基于时空边缘信息的MPM列表构建策略，减少索引开销，在RA和LDB配置下分别获得0.58%和1.00%的BD-rate增益。
AI.motivation: GEO提供140种分区候选，索引信号开销大，需要降低编码开销以提高编码效率。
AI.method: 利用CU的结构特性及时空相邻块的相关性，构建MPM列表；基于分区模式与物体边界高度相关的观察，提出边缘导向的几何分区方案，根据时空边缘信息构建MPM列表。
AI.result: 相比VTM-6.0，RA配置下平均BD-rate增益0.58%，LDB配置下平均增益1.00%，同时提升了物体边界的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的GEO模式预测策略有效降低了索引开销，提升了编码效率和视觉质量。

title: Sample Complexity and Decision-Theoretic Guarantees for Bayesian Model Averaging over Decision Trees with Catalan-Exponential Priors
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures, Submitted to the Journal of Machine Learning Research
summary: We ask: when do Bayesian model averaging (BMA) weights over decision trees carry sufficient epistemic information to justify committed exploitation of the averaging distribution? We answer this question in closed form for Bayesian decision trees (BDTs) with Dirichlet-Multinomial leaf models and a Catalan-exponential tree-size prior (Schetinin&Jakaite, 2025), establishing a complete non-asymptotic theory of rational commitment thresholds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对贝叶斯决策树中的模型平均权重，建立了何时可以理性承诺利用平均分布的完整非渐近理论，给出了闭合形式的承诺阈值。
AI.motivation: 探究贝叶斯模型平均（BMA）权重在决策树上何时携带足够的认知信息，以证明对平均分布进行承诺性利用是合理的。
AI.method: 针对具有Dirichlet-Multinomial叶模型和Catalan指数树大小先验的贝叶斯决策树，建立了理性承诺阈值的闭合形式。
AI.result: 建立了完整的非渐近理性承诺阈值理论，给出了闭合形式的答案。
AI.conclusion: 在特定先验假设下，BMA权重在决策树上可以具备足够的认知信息，支持理性承诺利用。

title: Conditional Collapse in Sign Language Production: A Diagnostic and a Scaling Argument
summary:
Sign Language Production (SLP) is the task of generating avatar sign language motion from natural language
  text. The quality of the generated motion is typically evaluated by a motion-space Fréchet distance (FID) and
  back-translation (BT) BLEU score on benchmarks such as How2Sign. Both metrics can improve substantially
  while the underlying generator fails to faithfully represent the sign language gestures. In this work we
  propose to evaluate the generated motion at three independent levels: (τ1) initial-pose conditioning, (τ2)
  output diversity, and (τ3) target faithfulness. We compute these as pairwise-distance ratios using latent
  representations of a frozen motion autoencoder (MoAE). We evaluate 14 SLP model checkpoints on the How2Sign
  dataset, including a re-implemented Neural Sign Actors (NSA), and show that τ3 faithfulness is never
  attained, while FID varies by nearly two orders of magnitude and is uncorrelated with faithfulness. We show
  that on the isolated gloss dataset ASL3DWord favorable τ3 can be attained, hence isolating the size of the
  sentence-level paired-dataset as the bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有手语生成评价指标（FID和BLEU）存在缺陷，提出三个独立评价层级（τ1初始姿态、τ2多样性、τ3目标忠实度），并通过实验发现当前模型在句子级数据集上无法达到忠实度要求，而孤立词汇数据集可达到，揭示句子级配对数据规模是瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有评价指标FID和BLEU在生成质量不佳时仍可能表现良好，无法真实反映生成手势是否忠实于目标语义，需要更完善的评价体系。
AI.method: 提出三个独立评价层级：τ1初始姿态条件、τ2输出多样性、τ3目标忠实度；使用冻结运动自编码器的潜在表示计算成对距离比率；在How2Sign数据集上评估14个模型检查点。
AI.result: τ3忠实度在所有句子级模型上均未达到；FID变化近两个数量级且与忠实度不相关；在孤立词汇数据集ASL3DWord上可达到τ3，说明句子级配对数据规模是瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 现有SLP模型在句子级生成中缺乏语义忠实度，当前评价指标具有误导性，需扩大句子级配对数据规模以提升模型表现。

title: All Models are Wrong, Knowing Where is Useful: On Model Uncertainty in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) infers information about the environment from a learned dynamics model and bears the potential to address open problems such as data efficient and safe learning in robotics. However, inaccuracies of the learned dynamics model are typically exploited by the agent, substantially hampering the capabilities of MBRL methods. We present a framework for dealing with inaccuracies of probabilistic models through targeted handling of uncertainty that effectively mitigates model exploitation. We present recent successes in learning directly on hardware and safe exploration, and discuss future directions for uncertainty-aware MBRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过针对性处理不确定性来缓解模型利用问题的框架，并展示了在硬件直接学习和安全探索方面的成功应用。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）有潜力解决数据高效和安全性学习等开放问题，但学习到的动力学模型的不准确性常被智能体利用，严重阻碍了MBRL方法的能力。
AI.method: 提出一个通过针对性处理不确定性来有效缓解模型利用问题的框架。
AI.result: 在硬件直接学习和安全探索方面取得了近期成功。
AI.conclusion: 讨论了不确定性感知MBRL的未来方向。

title: PhyScene3D: Physically Consistent Interactive 3D Tabletop Scene Generation
summary: Generating physically consistent 3D tabletop scenes is a fundamental yet underexplored problem for interactive and generalist robotic learning. The challenge stems from dense object hierarchies and irregular affordances. Here, an interactive scene denotes a physically valid, collision-free environment directly loadable into physics simulators. Existing methods, ranging from decoupled symbolic solvers to end-to-end regression models, often suffer from error propagation or overfitting to noisy supervision containing widespread physical violations. To address these limitations, we introduce PhyScene3D, a framework that reformulates generation as a Human-Mimetic Constructive Process. The proposed Cognitive Topological Reasoning Chain (CTRC) factorizes scene synthesis into a sequential, anchor-conditioned process. It employs a 3D AABB-based placement scheme that imposes a strong structural inductive bias. To address imperfect supervision and physical infeasibility, we introduce Physics-Aware Denoising Alignment (PADA). It integrates a differentiable Signed Distance Field (SDF) with Test-Time Optimization (TTO) to project generated scenes onto a physics-feasible manifold while preserving semantic intent. Experiments demonstrate that PhyScene3D outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both semantic accuracy and physical validity, achieving a 40% reduction in scene-wise collision rate relative to the human-annotated training data.

AI.tldr: PhyScene3D 通过认知拓扑推理链和物理感知去噪对齐，将3D桌面场景生成重构为类人构造过程，显著降低了碰撞率并提升了物理有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如解耦符号求解器和端到端回归模型）在处理3D桌面场景生成时存在误差传播、过拟合以及广泛物理违规等问题，缺乏对密集物体层次结构和不规则可操作性的有效处理。
AI.method: 提出PhyScene3D框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 认知拓扑推理链(CTRC)，将场景合成分解为基于锚点的序列化过程，采用3D AABB放置方案引入强结构归纳偏置；2) 物理感知去噪对齐(PADA)，通过可微符号距离场(SDF)与测试时优化(TTO)将生成场景投影到物理可行的流形上，同时保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，PhyScene3D在语义准确性和物理有效性上均优于现有方法，场景级碰撞率相比人工标注训练数据降低了40%。
AI.conclusion: PhyScene3D通过类人构造过程有效解决了3D桌面场景生成中的物理一致性问题，为机器人学习和交互式仿真提供了可直接加载的高质量场景数据。

title: BRo-JEPA: Learning Modular Arithmetic in Latent Space
summary: Can neural networks learn abstract algebraic rules, or do they merely memorize training patterns? We investigate this using MNIST digits as states and modular arithmetic operations as actions in a JEPA-style latent world model. Standard supervised baselines and JEPA models with additive operation embeddings fit seen operations but fail to extrapolate reliably to unseen ones. To bridge this gap, we introduce a block-rotation predictor that imposes the circular structure of modulo-10 arithmetic in latent space. This enables strong zero-shot generalization, with the best ResNet-based JEPA block-rotation model achieving 99.46\% zero-shot and 99.46\% rollout accuracy. Our results suggest that latent world models can learn symbolic transformation rules when architecture matches the structure of the problem. Our code can be \href{https://github.com/DL-World-Models/mnist-math}{accessed here}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络能否学习抽象代数规则，通过在MNIST数字上应用模10算术运算，发现标准模型无法泛化到未见过的运算，而引入块旋转预测器（利用模10的循环结构）可实现零样本泛化，最佳模型达到99.46%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 探究神经网络是否真正学习到了抽象的代数规则，还是仅仅记忆了训练模式。
AI.method: 使用JEPA风格的潜在世界模型，以MNIST数字为状态、模10算术运算为动作，提出块旋转预测器在潜在空间中施加模10的循环结构。
AI.result: 基于ResNet的JEPA块旋转模型在零样本和rollout设置下均达到99.46%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 当模型架构与问题结构相匹配时，潜在世界模型可以学习符号变换规则，实现强零样本泛化。

title: Restoring Initial Noise Sensitivity in Text-to-Image Distillation via Geometric Alignment
summary: Generative distillation significantly accelerates text-to-image (T2I) generation by compressing multi-step trajectories into few-step student models while preserving perceptual quality. However, existing methods primarily optimize efficiency and output fidelity, often neglecting critical properties of the original trajectory. In this work, we identify a key missing property: sensitivity to initial noise, whose degradation impairs downstream control methods relying on noise-based optimization and manipulation. We trace this issue to standard distillation objectives that enforce pointwise output alignment, inadvertently flattening the input-output landscape and suppressing the teacher's local geometric structure. To address this, we propose Geometry-Aware Distillation (GAD), a sensitivity-preserving framework that aligns the local functional behavior of teacher and student models. Specifically, GAD matches Jacobian-vector products with respect to input noise, enabling the student to reproduce the teacher's differential response to perturbations. Extensive experiments across multiple T2I paradigms and noise-driven control tasks demonstrate that GAD significantly restores sensitivity and improves diversity while maintaining high visual fidelity. Code is available at https://github.com/Hannah1102/GAD.

AI.tldr: 提出几何感知蒸馏(GAD)框架，通过对齐教师-学生模型对输入噪声的雅可比-向量积，恢复学生模型对初始噪声的敏感性，从而在保持视觉质量的同时提升下游噪声驱动控制任务的性能与多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式蒸馏方法仅关注效率和输出保真度，忽略了学生模型对初始噪声的敏感性这一关键属性，导致依赖噪声优化的下游控制方法性能退化。
AI.method: 提出GAD框架，通过匹配教师和学生模型关于输入噪声的雅可比-向量积(Jacobian-vector products)，对齐局部函数行为，保留教师模型的局部几何结构。
AI.result: 在多种T2I范式和噪声驱动控制任务上，GAD显著恢复了噪声敏感性，提升了生成多样性，同时保持了高视觉保真度。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏过程应保留教师模型对初始噪声的敏感性，GAD通过几何对齐有效解决了这一被忽视的问题，未来可扩展到更多生成任务。

title: From Performance to Viability: A Bootstrap Framework for Latent-Space Representation Learning in Adaptive Biological Systems
comment: 25 pages. Methodological framework for latent-space representation learning in adaptive biological systems
summary: Observable performance is commonly used to characterize biological systems. In adaptive systems, however, similar performances may arise from distinct organizations, and configurations that appear comparable at a given time may follow different longitudinal trajectories. This limitation motivates a methodological framework for moving beyond performance-based interpretation without assuming a complete mechanistic model in advance. This article proposes a bootstrap framework for latent-space representation learning in adaptive biological systems. Here, bootstrap is used in a methodological and epistemological sense: new analytical levels are introduced when the preceding representation becomes insufficient to account for observed adaptive dynamics. The framework is organized around five levels: observable performance, dynamic organization, latent organization, longitudinal viability, and internal predictive approximation. The framework is illustrated by three previously reported gait--occlusion studies, used here only as a methodological case sequence and not as new experimental evidence. The article formalizes how performance analysis led to latent organization, how static latent organization led to longitudinal viability, and how observed viability led to internal predictive approximation. The contribution is not a new learning algorithm, clinical protocol, or dataset, but a bootstrap framework for latent-space representation learning describing how increasingly informative representations can emerge from observational insufficiencies in adaptive biological data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自适应生物系统的潜在空间表示学习的自举框架，通过五个分析层次（可观测性能、动态组织、潜在组织、纵向生存能力、内部预测近似）逐步构建更丰富的数据表征，以超越基于性能的浅层解释。
AI.motivation: 自适应生物系统中，相似的表观性能可能源于不同的内在组织，且当前表现相似的系统未来轨迹可能不同。仅依赖性能指标无法区分这些差异，而完整的机理模型又难以预先获得，因此需要一种介于两者之间的方法论框架。
AI.method: 提出一个五层次自举框架：(1) 可观测性能 → (2) 动态组织 → (3) 潜在组织 → (4) 纵向生存能力 → (5) 内部预测近似。每一层在当前表征不足以解释自适应动态时，通过自举引入新的分析层级。
AI.result: 通过三个已发表的步态-遮挡研究作为方法学案例序列，展示了如何从性能分析得出潜在组织，从静态潜在组织得出纵向生存能力，以及从观测到的生存能力得出内部预测近似。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献并非新的学习算法、临床方案或数据集，而是一个描述如何从观测不足中逐步涌现更丰富表征的自举框架，为自适应生物系统的潜在空间表示学习提供方法论指导。

title: RPCASSM: Robust PCA State Space Model For Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: The detection and segmentation of infrared small targets have important application significance in the fields of surveillance and security, maritime rescue and so on. Due to the low occupancy of these targets in long-distance imaging, the mainstream visual state space model is inefficient and difficult to accurately model the target edge. The existing infrared state space models do not deviate from the mainstream visual state space structure framework from the structural properties of infrared small targets. In order to solve this problem, this paper proposes the RPCASSM network based on the model paradigm of robust principal component analysis(RPCA), which aims to design the background state space module(BSSM) and the target state space module(TSSM) by the nature of the infrared small target in the spatial domain. The BSSM aims to use the saliency of spatial heterogeneous signals to design a spatial probe scanning mechanism(SPCM) to model background information. The TSSM designs a deformable prompt scanning mechanism(DPCM) by using the sparsity and local highlight of the target to focus on the deformable space of the target for state space modeling. According to the above design, we effectively solve the problem that the existing mainstream vision state space model is difficult to accurately model the edge structure of infrared small target. Experimental results on the existing benchmark data sets prove the effectiveness of the RPCASSM design. Our code will be made public at \href{https://github.com/PepperCS/RPCASSM}{RPCASSM}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RPCASSM网络，基于鲁棒主成分分析范式，通过设计背景状态空间模块(BSSM)和目标状态空间模块(TSSM)，解决了红外小目标检测与分割中主流视觉状态空间模型难以准确建模目标边缘的问题。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标在远距离成像中像素占比低，主流视觉状态空间模型效率低且难以精确建模目标边缘；现有红外状态空间模型未从红外小目标的结构特性出发设计框架。
AI.method: 基于RPCA模型范式，提出RPCASSM网络。BSSM利用空间异质信号显著性设计空间探针扫描机制(SPCM)建模背景信息；TSSM利用目标稀疏性和局部高亮特性设计可变形提示扫描机制(DPCM)，聚焦目标可变形空间进行状态空间建模。
AI.result: 在现有基准数据集上的实验结果证明了RPCASSM设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RPCASSM有效解决了主流视觉状态空间模型难以精确建模红外小目标边缘结构的问题，代码已开源。

title: Turning Back Without Forgetting: Selective Backward Refinement for Parameter-Efficient Continual Learning
summary: While prompt-based parameter-efficient continual learning mitigates catastrophic forgetting by isolating task-specific prompts, this isolation also limits later tasks from improving earlier ones, leaving backward knowledge transfer underexplored. We address this limitation by proposing Selective bAckward refinement for positive Backward knowledge transfER (SABER), a replay-free framework that enables controlled backward transfer in prompt-based continual learning. SABER determines when backward refinement is beneficial using complementary task-correlation criteria based on prompt-gradient geometry and loss-distribution similarity, and how to perform refinement safely by restricting updates to non-interfering directions in the prompt parameter space. Extensive experiments across multiple continual learning benchmarks and diverse pretrained backbones, including T5-Large, LLaMA, and Qwen, demonstrate that SABER consistently achieves positive backward transfer while maintaining strong overall average performance. Code is available at https://github.com/OptMN-Lab/SABER-ICML-2026/.

AI.tldr: SABER 提出了一种基于提示的回放无关连续学习方法，通过选择性反向精炼实现正向的后向知识迁移，在多个基准和预训练模型上都取得了正向后向迁移和稳定的平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的参数高效连续学习虽然通过隔离任务特定提示缓解了灾难性遗忘，但这种隔离机制也阻碍了后续任务改进先前任务的能力，导致反向知识迁移（backward transfer）未被充分探索。
AI.method: SABER 提出两个关键机制：1) 基于提示梯度几何和损失分布相似性的互补任务相关性准则，判断何时进行反向精炼；2) 将更新限制在提示参数空间中非干扰方向上，确保安全地进行反向迁移。
AI.result: 在多个连续学习基准和不同预训练骨干网络（T5-Large、LLaMA、Qwen）上，SABER 持续实现正向后向迁移，同时保持整体平均性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SABER 有效解决了提示隔离带来的后向迁移缺失问题，为提示式连续学习提供了可控的反向知识迁移框架。

title: Efficient Exploration for Iterative Nash Preference Optimization
summary: Preference alignment is central to improving large language models, but standard reward-based formulations can be restrictive when human preferences are cyclic, non-transitive, or otherwise not representable by a scalar reward. Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF) addresses this limitation by modeling alignment as a preference game and targeting a Nash equilibrium rather than a reward maximizer. However, the learning-theoretic foundations of scalable NLHF remain limited. Existing regret guarantees rely on oracle-based methods that estimate a general preference model and solve KL-regularized minimax problems, while iterative NLHF methods directly optimize policy-level preference losses and are easier to implement but lack regret guarantees. We study online iterative NLHF under general preference models and identify exploration as the key obstacle. First, we show that standard iterative NLHF can suffer an exponential dependence on the KL-regularization parameter, revealing that implicit exploration through policy updates is insufficient for controlling regret. Second, we propose an explicitly exploratory iterative NLHF algorithm that combines SFT-based regularization with adversarial policy exploration. The resulting method retains the direct policy optimization structure of iterative NLHF, avoids explicit preference model estimation, and achieves an $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret bound without an exponential dependence on the KL-regularization parameter. We show that the regret can be improved to $O(\log(T))$ with access to a minimax oracle, clarifying the computational-statistical tradeoff in learning general preference games. Finally, we instantiate our method for LLM fine-tuning and evaluate it on \texttt{Llama-3-8B-Instruct} across multiple benchmarks, where explicit exploration yields consistent improvements over existing NLHF baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线迭代式Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF)在通用偏好模型下的理论基础，发现标准迭代NLHF存在指数级依赖KL正则化参数的遗憾，并提出一种结合SFT正则化与对抗性策略探索的显式探索算法，实现了O(√T)遗憾界，并在Llama-3-8B-Instruct上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准基于奖励的偏好对齐方法在人类偏好存在循环、非传递等无法用标量奖励表示的情况时存在局限性。NLHF将对齐建模为偏好博弈并求解纳什均衡，但其可扩展学习理论基础薄弱，现有迭代NLHF方法缺乏遗憾保证。
AI.method: 首先理论上证明标准迭代NLHF的遗憾对KL正则化参数存在指数依赖；然后提出显式探索的迭代NLHF算法，结合SFT正则化与对抗性策略探索，保留直接策略优化结构，避免显式偏好模型估计；最后在Llama-3-8B-Instruct上微调验证。
AI.result: 所提算法实现O(√T)遗憾界，消除了对KL正则化参数的指数依赖；在拥有极小极大预言机时遗憾可改进至O(log T)；在多个基准上优于现有NLHF基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了迭代NLHF中探索不足是核心障碍，显式探索策略能有效解决该问题，同时阐明了计算-统计权衡关系。

title: Learning Label-Efficient Interpretable Medical Image Diagnosis via Semi-supervised Hypergraph Concept Bottleneck Model
summary: Deep learning has revolutionized medical image analysis, delivering exceptional diagnostic accuracy across diverse applications. Yet, the lack of interpretability in its decision-making hinders clinical adoption, particularly in high-stakes medical contexts where transparency is paramount for trustworthiness. For example, in Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS), subtle cues in ultrasound imaging challenge reliable diagnosis, rendering black-box models untrustworthy for accurate scoring. To address this, Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a promising avenue by embedding clinically meaningful intermediate concepts into the diagnosis pipeline, enabling clinicians to scrutinize and refine model outputs. However, conventional CBMs falter in capturing complex inter-concept dependencies and demand costly, expert-driven concept annotations, limiting their scalability. This study introduces a novel semi-supervised CBM framework designed for medical imaging, which leverages dual-level hypergraph learning to model high-order concept dependencies and generate domain-adaptive pseudo-labels. Our approach achieves superior interpretability and performance by integrating a concept-level hypergraph for enhanced reasoning and an image-level hypergraph for robust pseudo-label generation. Experiments on a newly annotated PAS ultrasound dataset and a breast ultrasound public dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed concept label-efficient interpretable framework. Its universality is further validated on the dermoscopic image dataset SkinCon. The code is available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/HyperCBM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督概念瓶颈模型（HyperCBM），通过双层级超图学习建模概念间高阶依赖关系，并生成自适应伪标签，在胎盘植入谱系（PAS）等医学影像任务中实现了可解释性与诊断性能的平衡，降低了概念标注成本。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像中诊断精度高但缺乏可解释性，阻碍了临床采纳。传统概念瓶颈模型（CBM）虽能引入可解释概念，但难以捕捉概念间复杂依赖关系，且需要昂贵的专家概念标注，限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出半监督CBM框架HyperCBM，包含双层级超图学习：1）概念级超图用于增强推理建模概念间高阶依赖；2）图像级超图用于生成域自适应伪标签，减少对人工概念标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在自建PAS超声数据集、公开乳腺超声数据集以及皮肤镜数据集SkinCon上验证了该框架的有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: HyperCBM在降低概念标注成本的同时，提升了模型的可解释性和诊断性能，为高风险医疗场景下的可信AI提供了可行方案。

title: Neural Network Compression by Approximate Differential Equivalence
summary: Neural network compression is commonly achieved by pruning parameters based on local importance scores, e.g., magnitude-based pruning. We propose a complementary approach that compresses models by aggregating neurons with similar functional behavior rather than removing weights independently. Our method encodes a trained network as a polynomial ODE system and applies a lumping method called Approximate Forward Differential Equivalence to identify neurons with approximately matching induced dynamics. A single tolerance parameter, $\varepsilon$, controls the compression level and induces a smooth trade-off between model size and predictive accuracy. We evaluate the method on synthetic datasets derived from nonlinear dynamical systems with known ground-truth behavior and on public regression benchmarks. Across both settings, the proposed approach achieves substantial parameter reduction while preserving accuracy, and consistently compares favorably with magnitude-based pruning and Wanda at similar compression levels. These results suggest that differential equivalence-based aggregation is a principled and effective alternative to conventional weight-centric pruning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于神经元聚合的神经网络压缩方法，通过将网络编码为多项式ODE系统并应用近似前向微分等价来合并功能相似的神经元，实现模型压缩，在保持精度的同时显著减少参数数量。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于重要性分数的剪枝方法（如magnitude-based pruning）是独立移除权重，忽略了神经元之间的功能相似性，缺乏更全局的视角。
AI.method: 1) 将训练好的网络编码为多项式ODE系统；2) 应用Approximate Forward Differential Equivalence方法识别具有近似匹配动态行为的神经元；3) 通过单一容差参数ε控制压缩程度，实现模型大小与预测精度之间的平滑权衡。
AI.result: 在合成数据集（来自非线性动力系统）和公共回归基准上，该方法实现了可观的参数减少同时保持准确性，且在相似压缩水平下一致优于magnitude-based pruning和Wanda方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于微分等价的聚合方法是一种有原则且有效的传统剪枝替代方案，为神经网络压缩提供了新思路。

title: MixerSENet: A Lightweight Framework for Efficient Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Accepted and Published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL)
summary: In this paper, a novel framework, MixerSENet, is introduced for hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, designed to address the challenges of computational efficiency and limited labeled data. The proposed model processes hyperspectral image patches while maintaining consistent size and resolution throughout the network, effectively decoupling the mixing of spatial and channel dimensions. Notably, MixerSENet is lightweight and computationally efficient, requiring fewer parameters compared to traditional models, making it suitable for resource-constrained environments. A squeeze and excitation block is incorporated into the model to refine feature extraction, enhancing the network's ability to capture more informative features. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that MixerSENet achieves superior performance, reaching an overall accuracy (OA) of 82.47% on Houston13 dataset and 96.70% on the Qingyun dataset, outperforming state-of-the-art methods including 3D-CNN, HybridKAN, HSIFormer, SimPoolFormer, and MorphMamba. Furthermore, a detailed analysis of computational efficiency shows that MixerSENet achieves a favorable balance between accuracy and efficiency, with only 53,146 parameters and an low inference time, confirming its practicality for real-world applications. At publication, source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerSENet.

AI.tldr: MixerSENet是一个轻量级的高光谱图像分类框架，通过解耦空间与通道维度、引入挤压激励模块，在保持计算效率的同时，在Houston13和Qingyun数据集上分别达到82.47%和96.70%的总体精度，仅需53,146个参数，优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱图像分类方法面临计算效率低和标注数据有限两大挑战，传统模型参数庞大，难以在资源受限环境中部署。
AI.method: 提出MixerSENet框架，保持图像块在网络中分辨率一致，解耦空间与通道维度的混合处理，并引入挤压激励（Squeeze-and-Excitation）模块增强特征提取能力，实现轻量化设计。
AI.result: 在Houston13数据集上OA达82.47%，Qingyun数据集上OA达96.70%，参数仅53,146个，推理时间低，优于3D-CNN、HybridKAN、HSIFormer、SimPoolFormer和MorphMamba等方法。
AI.conclusion: MixerSENet在准确率与效率之间取得了良好平衡，验证了其在实际应用中的实用性和资源受限场景下的部署潜力。

title: GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA: A Near-optimal Algorithm for Low-precision Quantization with Low-rank Adaptation
summary: Post-training quantization is widely used for compressing large neural networks, but aggressive low-bit quantization can significantly degrade model quality. A common remedy is to augment the quantized weights with a low-rank correction, leading to approximations of the form $W\approx Q+LR$. In this paper, we study this low-precision plus low-rank representation through the layer-wise reconstruction objective $\|XW-X(Q+LR)\|_F^2$, where $X$ is a calibration matrix. We establish, to our knowledge, the first information-theoretic lower bounds for this problem under finite-alphabet and bounded low-rank compensation constraints. We then propose GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA, a training-free algorithm that incorporates the low-rank correction directly into a GPTQ-style quantization pass by appropriately augmenting the calibration Hessian. For the choice $L=V_r$, where $V_r$ contains the top right singular vectors of $X$, we prove layer-wise reconstruction error bounds in which the usual GPTQ dependence on $\|X\|_F^2$ is replaced by the rank-$r$ residual $\|X-X_r\|_F^2$, up to regularization terms. Under natural structural assumptions, these bounds match the information-theoretic lower bounds in their dominant scaling, up to constants and mild factors. We also introduce Bid-Up, a fixed-grid quantization refinement step that can be alternated with optimal low-rank compensation with guaranteed non-increasing layer-wise reconstruction error. Experiments on Qwen3 language models and DeiT vision transformers show that GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA improves over GPTQ and GPTQ followed by low-rank compensation, with additional gains from refinement loops.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA算法，将低秩补偿直接融入GPTQ量化过程，并给出信息论下界与理论误差保证，实验验证其在语言模型和视觉Transformer上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 后训练量化虽广泛用于压缩大模型，但激进的低比特量化会严重损害模型质量。常见补救措施是在量化权重上添加低秩校正，然而现有方法缺乏理论理解，且直接组合GPTQ和低秩补偿并非最优。
AI.method: 1) 建立有限字母表和低秩约束下的信息论下界；2) 提出GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA，通过增强校准Hessian矩阵将低秩校正直接融入GPTQ量化过程；3) 提出Bid-Up固定网格量化细化步骤，可与最优低秩补偿交替进行。
AI.result: 理论：当L取X的右奇异向量时，层间重构误差界中GPTQ对||X||_F^2的依赖被替换为秩r残差||X-X_r||_F^2，且与信息论下界的主导标度相匹配。实验：在Qwen3语言模型和DeiT视觉Transformer上，GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA优于GPTQ及先GPTQ后低秩补偿的方法，细化循环带来额外提升。
AI.conclusion: 将低秩补偿内嵌到量化过程中比事后补偿更优，所提算法无训练、理论保证强，且可通过细化步骤进一步提升效果。

title: Spatio-Temporal Correlation Guided Geometric Partitioning for Versatile Video Coding
summary: Geometric partitioning has attracted increasing attention by its remarkable motion field description capability in the hybrid video coding framework. However, the existing geometric partitioning (GEO) scheme in Versatile Video Coding (VVC) causes a non-negligible burden for signaling the side information. Consequently, the coding efficiency is limited. In view of this, we propose a spatio-temporal correlation guided geometric partitioning (STGEO) scheme to efficiently describe the object information in the motion field of video coding. The proposed method can economize the bits consumed for side information signaling, including the partitioning mode and motion information. We firstly analyze the characteristics of partitioning mode decision and motion vector selection in a statistically-sound way. Based on the observed spatio-temporal correlation, we design a mode prediction and coding method to reduce the overhead for representing the above mentioned side information. The main idea is to predict the STGEO modes and motion candidates that have higher selection possibilities, which can guide the entropy coding, i.e., representing the predicted high-probability modes and motion candidates with fewer bits. In particular, the high-probability STGEO modes are predicted based on the edge information and history modes of adjacent STGEO-coded blocks. The corresponding motion information is represented by the index in a merge candidate list, which is adaptively inferred based on the off-line trained merge candidate selection probability. Simulation results show that the proposed approach achieves 0.95% and 1.98% bit-rate savings on average compared to VTM-8.0 without GEO for Random Access and Low-Delay B configurations, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于时空相关性引导的几何划分（STGEO）方案，通过预测高概率划分模式和运动候选来减少边信息开销，在VVC框架下平均节省0.95%~1.98%的码率。
AI.motivation: VVC中现有几何划分（GEO）方案在描述运动场时需传输大量边信息（划分模式和运动信息），导致编码效率受限。
AI.method: 1) 统计分析方法分析划分模式决策和运动矢量选择的特性；2) 利用时空相关性设计模式预测与编码方法；3) 基于边缘信息和历史模式预测高概率STGEO模式；4) 基于离线训练的合并候选选择概率自适应推断运动信息索引。
AI.result: 相比VTM-8.0（无GEO），在Random Access和Low-Delay B配置下分别平均节省0.95%和1.98%的码率。
AI.conclusion: 所提STGEO方案能有效减少几何划分的边信息比特开销，提升混合视频编码框架的编码效率。

title: Target localization, identification and sensing using latent symmetries
comment: Submitted to SIAM Journal on Imaging Sciences
summary: We show that an array of scatterers which has been designed to have latent ("hidden") symmetries can be used as a sensor. We use the capacitance matrix as a canonical model for three-dimensional hybridisation and study how the introduction of an "intruder'' scatterer breaks the latent symmetries. By analysing the degree to which each symmetry is broken, we identify the radius of the intruder and localize its position. This can be achieved using a dictionary-based approach, however Bayesian inference or an artificial neural network (multi-layer perceptron) perform better in the presence of measurement noise. To our knowledge, this is the first time latent symmetries have been exploited successfully for sensing problems. It is also the first time latent symmetries have been observed in a three-dimensional open system that cannot be approximated by a sparse graph.

AI.tldr: 本文利用具有潜在（隐藏）对称性的散射体阵列作为传感器，通过分析入侵者如何打破这些对称性来实现其半径识别和位置定位。研究比较了字典方法、贝叶斯推断和人工神经网络在存在测量噪声时的性能，并首次在三维开放系统中成功应用潜在对称性进行传感。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器设计通常依赖显式结构特征，而潜在对称性作为一种隐蔽的几何规律尚未被用于传感问题。本文旨在探索能否利用散射体阵列中设计的潜在对称性作为传感机制，实现对入侵物体的检测与定位。
AI.method: 以电容矩阵作为三维杂化模型，设计具有潜在对称性的散射体阵列。通过引入入侵者打破对称性，分析各对称性被破坏的程度来推断入侵者半径和位置。采用字典方法进行定位，并与贝叶斯推断及多层感知机人工神经网络在噪声环境下的性能进行对比。
AI.result: 成功利用潜在对称性实现了对入侵者半径和位置的识别；在存在测量噪声的情况下，贝叶斯推断和人工神经网络的性能优于字典方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将潜在对称性成功应用于传感问题，并首次在无法用稀疏图近似的三维开放系统中观测到潜在对称性，为新型传感器设计提供了理论依据。

title: Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs
summary: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content. Earlier solutions typically rely on fine-tuning or prompt engineering, which either undermine the advantages of pre-trained models or are prone to hallucination. In this work, we propose Density-Aware Translation (DAT) that refines image-text similarity scores using a local geometric density term derived from group reference sets. Our approach is motivated by the phenomenon that CLIP embeddings exhibit a modality gap and lie on an anisotropic shell in the feature space: common patterns cluster near the mean, while rare patterns are pushed outward. This geometry creates uneven alignment, where spurious correlations are amplified while semantically meaningful but rare cues are marginalised. To address this, we employ a relative measure to rescale similarities based on embedding density, suppressing overconfident scores in diffuse regions while preserving dense, semantically consistent matches. Experimental results on benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in worst-group and average accuracy, highlighting density-aware translation as a simple and effective calibration mechanism for reliable zero-shot classification using multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出密度感知翻译（DAT）方法，通过基于局部几何密度的相对度量来重新校准CLIP等视觉-语言模型的图像-文本相似度，有效减轻虚假相关性，提升零样本分类的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: CLIP等VLM模型在零样本分类中易受虚假相关性影响，即上下文线索主导而语义内容被忽视。此前微调或提示工程方法存在破坏预训练优势或易产生幻觉的问题。
AI.method: 提出密度感知翻译（DAT），利用组参考集计算局部几何密度项，基于CLIP嵌入在特征空间中呈各向异性壳状分布（常见模式靠近均值，稀有模式被推向外围）的现象，通过相对度量重新缩放相似度，抑制扩散区域的过置信分数，保留致密区域的一致性语义匹配。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，最差组准确率和平均准确率均取得一致性提升。
AI.conclusion: 密度感知翻译是一种简单有效的校准机制，可提升多模态模型在零样本分类中的可靠性。

title: Learning-based Directed Graph Abstraction of Combinatorial Spaces for Order-Preserving Search in Mixed-Combinatorial Nonlinear Optimization
comment: Accepted for presentation at 2026, ASME IDETC
summary: Mixed-combinatorial nonlinear programming (MCNLP) problems arise in many engineering design and planning applications, e.g., due to categorical, component, and geometric design choices, as well as joint task and motion planning. Traditional representations of combinatorial spaces, such as integer or binary encoding, often introduce spurious relations, increase dimensionality, and require additional compatibility constraints. Instead, this paper draws on recent developments in robot planning and vehicle/network routing domains that aim to learn search heuristics over combinatorial spaces using graph neural networks (GNNs). More specifically, this paper presents a first-of-its-kind structured abstraction of the combinatorial space by learning a mapping from an undirected fully connected graph of combinations to a directed graph indicating improvement directions using an Edge Field Graph Network (EFGN). To demonstrate the utility of this new way of abstracting the combinatorial space in solving MCNLPs, we adopt a recent optimization framework that purely searches over the non-combinatorial (e.g., continuous) variables and retrieves the best-suited combination for each candidate design by using the abstraction model, akin to a recommender system. The presented direction-aware abstraction model provides a potentially more scalable and interpretable retrieval of combinations compared to the original recommendation system in that framework. For evaluation, the proposed method is integrated with a well-known particle swarm optimization and genetic algorithm solvers on three benchmark nonlinear problems with varying numbers of combinations and variables. Compared to baseline solvers using indexified combinations, the GNN-based recommender consistently achieves better mean optimum values and robustness across multiple runs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于图神经网络（EFGN）的结构化抽象方法，将混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）中的组合空间映射为有向图，以学习搜索启发式，并集成到粒子群优化和遗传算法中，在三个基准问题上取得了更优的均值最优值和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统MCNLP中组合空间的整数/二进制编码会引入虚假关系、增加维度并需要额外兼容约束，因此需要更高效、可扩展且可解释的组合空间抽象方法。
AI.method: 利用Edge Field Graph Network（EFGN）学习从无向全连接组合图到指示改进方向的有向图的映射，并将该抽象模型作为推荐系统集成到仅搜索连续变量的优化框架中。
AI.result: 在三个不同规模和变量数量的基准非线性问题上，集成GNN推荐器的粒子群优化和遗传算法相比使用索引化组合的基线求解器，获得了更好的均值最优值和更高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EFGN提供的方向感知抽象模型相比原始推荐系统更具可扩展性和可解释性，为MCNLP问题的求解提供了新的有效途径。

title: Improving Visual Token Reduction via Rectifying Distortions for Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference
summary: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in vision-language tasks, yet the quadratic computational complexity arising from the vast number of visual tokens incurs significant memory and latency bottlenecks. While visual token reduction (VTR) strategies have been explored to mitigate this burden, existing methods overlook the positional and attentional consistency between the full and reduced sequences, resulting in a distorted representation. To this end, we propose RESTORE, a novel VTR framework that rectifies the positional and attentional distortions while maintaining efficiency. Specifically, we present a simple yet effective calibration method that restores lost visual attention by augmenting attention weights based on relative distances. We also introduce a distinctive anchor selection for token merging to mitigate information loss during feature averaging. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently improves the accuracy of various reduction methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance while maintaining computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出RESTORE框架，通过校准位置和注意力失真、改进token合并策略，在降低视觉token计算复杂度的同时保持多模态大模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token缩减方法忽略了全序列与缩减序列之间的位置和注意力一致性，导致表征失真，亟需一种能同时保持效率与准确性的校准方法。
AI.method: 提出RESTORE框架：1) 基于相对距离增强注意力权重的校准方法恢复丢失的视觉注意力；2) 引入独特的锚点选择策略进行token合并，减少特征平均时的信息损失。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，RESTORE一致提升了多种缩减方法的准确率，实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过校准位置和注意力失真，RESTORE有效解决了视觉token缩减中的表征扭曲问题，在效率与性能之间取得了更好的平衡。

title: Leaf Spectral Reflectance Prediction Using Multi-Head Attention Neural Networks
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Author-accepted version of the SPIE conference paper
summary: Accurate modeling of leaf spectral reflectance from physiological and biochemical traits is essential for advancing remote sensing applications in plant science and precision agriculture. Widely used radiative transfer models, such as PROSPECT-PRO, rely on generalized trait-reflectance relationships developed from a wide range of species, which may not fully capture the spectral behavior of specific crops like grapevines. In this study, we developed a trait-to-spectra prediction model using a multi-head attention neural network trained on a grapevine-specific dataset that includes 16 leaf traits measured across multiple varieties, growth stages, and years. The model was evaluated using stratified 5-fold cross-validation and achieved an average coefficient of determination (R^2) of 0.84 and normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) of 1.52 percent, demonstrating high accuracy and generalizability. When compared to PROSPECT-PRO in forward mode, the neural network exhibited lower mean absolute error (MAE), especially in the near-infrared (NIR) and shortwave-infrared (SWIR) regions. These results emphasize the importance of species-specific modeling approaches and show that integrating biochemical and structural traits into data-driven architectures can significantly improve spectral prediction. The proposed model provides a robust framework for generating accurate leaf-level reflectance data, with potential applications in canopy trait retrieval, vineyard monitoring, and remote sensing-driven crop management.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于多头注意力神经网络的葡萄叶片特征-光谱预测模型，在葡萄专用数据集上实现了R²=0.84、NRMSE=1.52%的高精度，优于传统PROSPECT-PRO模型，尤其在近红外和短波红外区域表现更佳，强调了物种特异性建模的重要性。
AI.motivation: 传统辐射传输模型（如PROSPECT-PRO）基于多物种通用关系，可能无法准确捕捉特定作物（如葡萄）的光谱特征，因此需要开发针对特定物种的特征-光谱预测模型。
AI.method: 利用多头注意力神经网络，基于包含16种叶片特征、涵盖多个品种、生长阶段和年份的葡萄专用数据集进行训练，采用分层5折交叉验证评估。
AI.result: 模型平均R²=0.84，NRMSE=1.52%；与PROSPECT-PRO正向模式相比，在NIR和SWIR区域MAE更低，准确性和泛化能力更优。
AI.conclusion: 物种特异性建模方法能显著提升光谱预测精度；将生化与结构特征整合到数据驱动架构中具有重要价值；该模型可用于冠层特征反演、葡萄园监测及遥感驱动的作物管理。

title: FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds
summary: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as DINOv2-ViT-S/14 provide robust semantic features, their latent manifolds exhibit prominent curvature, projecting uniform linear motion in physical space onto highly non-linear trajectories in the feature space, which hinders reliable reconstruction under sparse anchor conditions. To enable the aforementioned interpolation-based reconstruction, we introduce a residual transformation $\hat{\mathbf{z}} = \mathbf{z} + \text{Res}(\mathbf{z})$ to the raw foundation features $\mathbf{z}$, where $\text{Res}(\cdot)$ represents a learnable adapter. Our method explicitly suppresses manifold curvature using a mathematically grounded Pullback Flatness Loss that minimizes the deviation of intermediate features from the linear segment connecting adjacent anchors, thereby minimizing the intrinsic curvature of the manifold. Through this spatial flattening, map construction is formulated within an Expectation-Maximization (EM) framework, decoupled into a continuous M-step for manifold adaptation and a conceptual E-step for optimal anchor selection guidelines. Experiments on the NCLT dataset demonstrate that the application of our adapter leads to significant performance improvements even under extremely sparse anchor conditions with 100m intervals and extreme seasonal changes.

AI.tldr: FlatVPR通过对特征流形进行几何矫正，使得相邻锚点间的描述子可以通过线性插值精确重建，从而在视觉位置识别中平衡了地图轻量性与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有VPR方法中，使用轻量地图（稀疏锚点）与高定位精度之间存在矛盾。虽然DINOv2等基础模型提供鲁棒语义特征，但其潜在流形存在显著曲率，导致物理空间中的均匀线性运动映射到特征空间后呈非线性轨迹，使得稀疏锚点条件下无法可靠重建中间特征。
AI.method: 提出FlatVPR范式：1) 对原始基础特征施加可学习的残差适配器变换；2) 利用Pullback Flatness Loss最小化流形曲率，强制中间特征逼近相邻锚点间的线性插值线段；3) 将地图构建建模为EM框架，解耦为连续M步（流形适配）和概念E步（最优锚点选择）。
AI.result: 在NCLT数据集上，即使在100米间隔的极端稀疏锚点条件下以及剧烈季节变化场景中，FlatVPR显著提升了定位性能。
AI.conclusion: FlatVPR有效桥接了地图轻量性与定位精度的权衡，通过流形展平实现了稀疏锚点下的可靠特征重建，为VPR系统设计提供了新思路。

title: CEAR: Certified Ensemble Adversarial Robustness in DNNs
comment: This is the preprint of the work accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Canadian AI 2026); 19 Pages
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations, leading to extensive research on robustness for safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art empirical defense mechanisms improve the robustness of DNNs through the training phase, but still struggle against adaptive white-box attacks. On the other hand, certified defenses offer provable guarantees of robustness within a specified perturbation bound. These guarantees hold regardless of the level of perturbations, even if the attacker is given full knowledge of the model. In this paper, we propose CEAR, an ensemble-based robust method that utilizes a hybrid of empirical and certified defense mechanisms. CEAR trains each network within the ensemble using varying Gaussian noise and temperatures to obfuscate gradients and logits, making the model more resistant to stronger gradient-based attacks. We then use noisy logits and propose two different voting mechanisms to further improve robustness. Furthermore, we extend randomized smoothing to verify the robustness of ensemble-based classifiers. Our experimental evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet datasets demonstrate superior certified accuracy on average, increased robustness radius, and decreased transferability compared to baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEAR，一种结合经验性与认证性防御的集成方法，通过高斯噪声、温度调节和多种投票机制提升DNN对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上取得了更优的认证准确率和鲁棒半径。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络极易受对抗性扰动影响，现有经验性防御方法难以应对自适应白盒攻击，而认证性防御虽然提供可证明的鲁棒性保证但往往影响准确率，因此需要一种兼具两者优势的混合方法来提升模型的整体鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出CEAR集成方法：(1) 使用不同高斯噪声和温度训练多个网络以混淆梯度和logits；(2) 采用噪声logits并提出两种不同的投票机制；(3) 扩展随机平滑技术以验证集成分类器的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10和TinyImageNet数据集上的实验表明，CEAR在平均认证准确率、鲁棒半径和降低迁移性方面均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合经验性与认证性防御的集成方法能有效结合两者优势，不仅提升了模型对强梯度攻击的抵抗能力，还通过扩展随机平滑提供了可证明的鲁棒性保证，是一种有效的鲁棒性增强策略。

title: Sensitivity as a Double-Edged Sword: A Trade-off Between Discriminability and Adversarial Robustness
summary: Modern neural networks are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations. In this work, we identify that part of this vulnerability stems from the sensitivity of the widely used fully connected (FC) classifiers to such perturbations. In contrast, simple $\ell_2$ distance-based classifiers exhibit significantly greater robustness. We provide thorough theoretical and empirical analysis showing that while FC classifiers' high sensitivity makes them discriminative, it also makes them vulnerable. Conversely, $\ell_2$-classifiers' insensitivity grants robustness but limits performance. Motivated by this trade-off, we propose a novel $\ell_2$-reclassifier based on a Hybrid Prototype Mixing (HPM) framework. This method retains the discriminative power of FC classifiers while leveraging the robustness of $\ell_2$ distance. It yields $\ell_2$-distance-based predictions by fusing two prototype types: (1) stable, dataset-level prototypes updated via EMA, and (2) dynamic, batch-level prototypes generated from the FC classifier's predictions using a Straight-Through Estimator (STE). However, this dynamic, STE-based architecture introduces significant challenges for evaluation, such as gradient obfuscation and forward discontinuity. To address this, we propose a new, rigorous evaluation protocol, the Mixed Surrogate Attack (MSA), which uses multiple surrogates along with powerful AutoAttack to ensure a fair and robust assessment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our lightweight, plug-and-play module, with minimal fine-tuning, effectively enhances the adversarial robustness of various existing SOTA adversarially trained models.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了全连接分类器的高敏感性与ℓ2距离分类器的鲁棒性之间的权衡，提出基于混合原型混合（HPM）框架的ℓ2重分类器，并设计了混合代理攻击（MSA）评估协议，显著提升了多种对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络极易受到对抗扰动的影响，作者发现部分脆弱性源于广泛使用的全连接（FC）分类器对这些扰动的高度敏感，而简单的ℓ2距离分类器则表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出基于混合原型混合（HPM）框架的ℓ2重分类器，融合两种原型：1）通过EMA更新的稳定数据集级原型；2）使用直通估计器（STE）从FC分类器预测生成的动态批级原型。同时提出混合代理攻击（MSA）评估协议，使用多个代理模型配合AutoAttack进行公平评估。
AI.result: 轻量级即插即用模块只需极少微调，即可有效增强多种现有SOTA对抗训练模型的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FC分类器的高敏感性使其具有判别性但也使其脆弱，ℓ2分类器的低敏感性带来鲁棒性但限制了性能，HPM框架有效平衡了二者，并提出了可靠的评估方法解决梯度混淆和前向不连续问题。

title: UR-JEPA: Uniform Rectifiability as a Regularizer for Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures
summary: A central difficulty in training Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) is preventing representation collapse. LeJEPA addresses this by enforcing an isotropic Gaussian target on the embeddings via Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization (SIGReg). This target is in tension with the manifold hypothesis, which expects embeddings to concentrate on a low-dimensional subset of the ambient space. We propose \emph{UR-JEPA}, which targets a uniformly $n$-rectifiable measure of local tangent dimension $n$ at small scales, realized through a Gaussian-kernel smoothed Carleson-type square function $\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$, with a complementary Jones $β$-number formulation. On Inet10, UR-JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) attains $0.9141 \pm 0.0014$ for a $+0.83$\,pp gain over LeJEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{SIGReg}}$) with $\sim 30\%$ lower seed standard deviation; on matched-recipe Galaxy10~SDSS, a single-seed ImageNet-$100$ run, and a $3$-seed EuroSAT remote-sensing run, the two methods lie in the same peak-accuracy band at convergence, with UR-JEPA retaining its lower-seed-variance signature. On EuroSAT the in-domain pair is competitive at $96.0$ to $96.1\%$ with large remote-sensing foundation-model transfer at a $25\times$ smaller backbone. The distinction is geometric: direct visualization of the projector output distribution shows that on all four datasets UR--JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) produces a global PCA spectrum with a $4$ to $5$ order-of-magnitude drop at index $\sim 20$ to $25$ out of $D = 32$, while LeJEPA's spectrum is near-flat (top-to-bottom ratio at most $3.6$). Per-dimension marginals are simultaneously near-Gaussian for both methods (mean Shapiro-Wilk $W \in [0.992, 0.996]$) as a Diaconis-Freedman consequence. At matched accuracy the two regularizers therefore yield structurally distinct projected representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UR-JEPA方法，通过均匀n-可纠正测度替代各向同性高斯目标，解决JEPA中的表示坍缩问题。在多个数据集上，UR-JEPA相比LeJEPA获得准确率提升（Inet10上+0.83pp），且种子标准差降低约30%。两种方法在收敛时达到相同精度带，但几何结构截然不同：UR-JEPA的PCA谱呈现4-5个数量级下降，而LeJEPA近乎平坦。
AI.motivation: JEPA训练中的表示坍缩是核心难题。LeJEPA通过各向同性高斯正则化（SIGReg）缓解此问题，但高斯目标与流形假设（嵌入应集中在低维子集上）存在张力。作者希望设计一种与数据几何结构更一致的约束方法。
AI.method: 提出UR-JEPA，以均匀n-可纠正测度为目标，通过高斯核平滑的Carleson型平方函数L^CGLT实现，并辅以Jones β-数公式。在投影器输出上施加该正则化项。
AI.result: Inet10上UR-JEPA准确率0.9141±0.0014，比LeJEPA高0.83个百分点，标准差降低约30%。Galaxy10 SDSS、ImageNet-100、EuroSAT上两种方法峰值精度相近，但UR-JEPA种子方差更低。EuroSAT上以25倍更小的骨干网络达到96.0-96.1%，与大规模遥感基础模型相当。PCA谱显示UR-JEPA前20-25维占主导，LeJEPA谱平坦。
AI.conclusion: 均匀n-可纠正正则化在匹配准确率的前提下，能产生几何结构截然不同的投影表示（低维主导 vs. 各向同性），且具有更低的训练方差和更好的泛化稳定性。

title: Quality-Guided Semi-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Early Accept at MICCAI 2026, 13 pages, 2 figures
summary: Training accurate medical image segmentation models requires large amounts of densely annotated data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) alleviates this by learning from both abundant unlabeled data and limited labeled data. However, most modern SSL methods rely on pseudolabels for unlabeled data, and typically assess their reliability through model confidence or uncertainty, measures that are self-referential and lack explicit grounding in segmentation quality. Instead, we propose a quality-guided SSL framework that trains a dedicated network to estimate segmentation quality from image-mask pairs. The predictor is trained on variable-quality masks generated through synthetic corruptions augmented with imperfect outputs from partially trained segmentation models, capturing realistic error patterns encountered during training. We integrate the quality predictor into SSL through two complementary mechanisms: a quality-aware regularization loss and a quality-based pseudolabel sample reweighting scheme. We show that our method serves as a drop-in enhancement to existing SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments across five datasets and multiple architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over competing SSL methods, advancing the state-of-the-art in semi-supervised medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种质量引导的半监督学习框架，通过专门训练的网络估计分割质量，并将其作为伪标签可靠性的依据，在多个医学图像分割数据集上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法依赖模型置信度或不确定性来评估伪标签可靠性，但这些指标是自我参照的，缺乏对分割质量的明确衡量。
AI.method: 1) 训练专用网络从图像-掩膜对中估计分割质量；2) 通过合成损坏和部分训练模型的不完美输出生成可变质量掩膜来训练质量预测器；3) 引入质量感知正则化损失和基于质量的伪标签样本重加权机制。
AI.result: 在五个数据集和多种架构上的实验表明，该方法作为插件能一致提升现有SSL框架，超越竞争方法，达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 质量引导的伪标签评估方式比传统的自我参照置信度更有效，能够可靠地提升半监督医学图像分割性能。

title: Truthful AI Advisors: A Pre-Specified Benchmark for Large Language Model Honesty Under Preference Misalignment
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as advisors whose objective is not aligned with the user's: recommenders optimize for engagement, sales assistants for purchases, negotiation agents for concessions. Whether such advisors stay truthful when honesty conflicts with their own payoff is a core alignment-evaluation question. We turn the canonical Crawford-Sobel cheap-talk model into a pre-specified benchmark for LLM honesty under preference misalignment. Cheap-talk theory predicts neither full revelation nor silence but coarse monotone partitions, with fewer informative intervals as preference conflict grows. A sender observes a state omega in [0,1], wants the receiver's action near omega+b, and sends one costless message to a receiver whose ideal action is omega. The design uses 5 bias levels, 3 prompt frames, a fixed low-temperature setting, and 200 states per cell: 12,000 sender calls. For the positive-bias grid b in {0.01,0.04,0.08,0.12} the exact most-informative partition sizes are 7,4,3,2, with oracle normalized mutual information 0.5294, 0.3268, 0.2205, 0.1829. Running the full design on four instruction-tuned models (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, Llama-3.3-70B), we find all four over-reveal relative to the most-informative equilibrium by 1.8 to 4.2x: normalized mutual information stays at 0.78-0.94 where the oracle prescribes 0.18-0.53. Informativeness declines with bias as predicted but never approaches the strategic optimum; rather than coarse partitions, models show near-full revelation with a constant upward offset tracking their bias (linear exaggeration). Payoff-maximizing versus honesty framing has negligible effect. A decoder ablation shows the finding is recoverable only when the receiver reads the sender's stated number: an embedding-only decoder mis-reads the same data as near-babbling.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话模型基准，测试了四种大语言模型在偏好不一致时是否诚实。结果发现所有模型都过度揭示信息（比最优均衡高1.8-4.2倍），表现为近乎完全的揭示而非理论预测的粗糙分区，且诚实框架影响甚微。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型常被部署为推荐系统、销售助手等与用户利益不一致的顾问角色，评估它们在诚实与自身利益冲突时是否保持真实对齐至关重要。
AI.method: 将Crawford-Sobel廉价谈话模型转化为LLM诚实的预定义基准，设计5个偏差水平、3种提示框架、固定低温设置，对4种指令微调模型（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite、Llama-3.3-70B）进行12,000次发送者调用实验。
AI.result: 所有模型均过度揭示信息（互信息为0.78-0.94，远高于基准的0.18-0.53），表现为近乎完全的揭示和线性夸大，而非理论预测的粗糙分区；诚实vs利益最大化框架影响可忽略；编码器消融实验表明该发现仅当接收者读取发送者的数字时才成立。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在偏好不一致时倾向于过度诚实/过度揭示信息，而非策略性地隐瞒；这种模式更像是线性夸大而非理论预测的粗分区策略，且对提示框架不敏感。

title: EvoCut: Multi-Layer Evolution-Aware Visual Token Compression for Efficient Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) achieve strong performance on image and video understanding tasks, but their inference efficiency is constrained by the large number of visual tokens produced by vision encoders. Most existing visual token compression methods estimate token importance from attention scores or representation properties at specific layers, overlooking how visual tokens evolve across the vision encoder. Such layer-specific criteria may provide incomplete importance estimates and limit performance preservation after compression. To address this issue, we analyze layer-wise visual token evolution directions and observe that tokens form multiple group evolution directions across vision-encoder layers. Our analysis further shows that informative tokens tend to exhibit persistent deviations from common group evolution directions. Based on this observation, we propose EvoCut, a training-free and attention-free visual token compression method that estimates token importance from multi-layer evolution deviation. Experimental results show that EvoCut can retain only 11.1\% of the visual tokens on LLaVA-1.5-7B while preserving 94.4\% of the average performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing efficiency and accuracy.

AI.tldr: EvoCut是一种无需训练和注意力的视觉令牌压缩方法，通过分析跨层视觉令牌演化方向，保留仅11.1%的令牌即可维持94.4%的平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉令牌压缩方法依赖单层注意力分数或表示属性来估计令牌重要性，忽略了令牌在视觉编码器各层间的演化过程，导致重要性估计不完整，压缩后性能损失较大。
AI.method: 提出EvoCut方法，分析视觉令牌在编码器各层的演化方向，发现令牌形成多个组演化方向，信息丰富的令牌会持续偏离公共组演化方向，据此基于多层演化偏差估计令牌重要性，实现无训练、无注意力的压缩。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上仅保留11.1%的视觉令牌，即可保持94.4%的平均性能，有效平衡效率与准确率。
AI.conclusion: EvoCut通过跨层演化偏差有效识别重要视觉令牌，在显著压缩视觉令牌数量的同时较好保持模型性能，为LVLM推理效率优化提供了新思路。

title: Genotype-Conditioned Molecular Generation via Evidence-Grounded Multi-Objective Latent Perturbation in Diffusion Models
summary: Developing effective anticancer therapeutics remains challenging due to tumor heterogeneity and the absence of well-defined molecular targets across cancer subtypes. Generative models conditioned on cancer genotypes offer a promising avenue for personalized drug discovery, yet existing approaches lack explicit optimization for simultaneous sensitivity, synthesizability, and mechanistic binding plausibility. We present a latent-space optimization approach for a pretrained genotype-to-drug diffusion model, introducing a learnable perturbation over the molecular latent space optimized via gradient ascent to maximize a composite reward combining predicted drug sensitivity (AUC), drug-likeness (QED), and synthetic accessibility (SAS). Critically, biological realism is enforced by grounding both reward design and evaluation in experimentally-derived cancer cell line data and validated pharmacologic signals, anchoring candidate generation in real-world clinical evidence. Mechanistic consistency plausibility is further assessed by a multi-agent LLM pipeline grounded in the diffusion model's attention mechanism. Experiments across 15 cancer cell lines from three held-out evaluation sets demonstrate consistent and noticeable improvements over competing baselines in sensitivity, drug-likeness, synthesizability, and chemical validity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于潜空间优化的基因型到药物扩散模型，通过梯度上升优化复合奖励（敏感性、类药性、合成可及性），并在真实癌症细胞系数据上验证，相比基线方法在各指标上均有提升。
AI.motivation: 肿瘤异质性和缺乏明确分子靶点使抗癌药物开发困难，现有基于基因型的生成模型缺乏对药物敏感性、可合成性和机制结合合理性的联合优化。
AI.method: 在预训练的基因型到药物扩散模型的分子潜空间上引入可学习扰动，通过梯度上升最大化包含AUC（敏感性）、QED（类药性）和SAS（合成可及性）的复合奖励；利用多智能体LLM管道结合扩散模型注意力机制评估机制一致性。
AI.result: 在15个癌症细胞系（三个留出测试集）上，相比基线方法在敏感性、类药性、合成可及性和化学有效性上均取得一致且显著的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式优化多个关键指标并在真实临床数据上验证，为个性化抗癌药物发现提供了一种更实用、更可靠的生成策略。

title: PillarDETR: YOLO-Backbone and RT-DETR Head for Real-Time 3D Object Detection
summary: Real-time 3D object detection is a critical component for the safe operation of autonomous driving systems and robotics. While LiDAR point clouds provide accurate spatial information, processing them efficiently remains a significant challenge. Traditional methods rely on complex 3D convolutions or anchor-based paradigms that struggle to balance detection accuracy with inference speed. In this paper, we propose PillarDETR, a novel end-to-end 3D object detection architecture that combines the efficiency of pillar-based LiDAR encoding with the representational power of modern 2D vision models. Specifically, PillarDETR replaces standard convolutional backbones with a Cross Stage Partial (CSP) network derived from YOLOv8, enabling richer feature extraction from pseudoimages. Furthermore, we discard conventional anchor-based or center-based detection heads in favor of a Real-Time Detection Transformer (RT-DETR) decoder. This hybrid design allows the network to capture global context and directly predict 3D bounding boxes without relying on non-maximum suppression (NMS). Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that PillarDETR achieves a compelling trade-off between mean Average Precision (mAP) and inference latency. Our ablation studies confirm that integrating the YOLOv8 backbone and RT-DETR head yields substantial improvements over the PointPillars baseline, establishing PillarDETR as a highly effective solution for real-time 3D perception.

AI.tldr: PillarDETR是一种结合Pillar点云编码与YOLOv8骨干网络及RT-DETR解码器的实时端到端3D目标检测架构，在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上实现了mAP与推理延迟的良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统基于3D卷积或锚点机制的3D检测方法难以同时兼顾检测精度和推理速度，现有方法在实时性与准确性之间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 提出PillarDETR架构：采用Pillar-based LiDAR编码将点云转换为伪图像；使用YOLOv8的Cross Stage Partial (CSP)网络替代标准卷积主干进行特征提取；采用RT-DETR解码器取代锚点/中心点检测头，实现端到端预测，无需非极大值抑制（NMS）。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准测试上，PillarDETR实现了mAP与推理延迟之间的出色权衡；消融实验证实YOLOv8骨干和RT-DETR头的集成相比PointPillars基线有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PillarDETR是一种高效的实时3D感知解决方案，验证了将现代2D视觉模型轻量化组件引入3D检测的有效性。

title: OmniOPD: Logit-Free On-Policy Distillation via Speculative Verification
summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) trains a student model on its own generative trajectories under dense token-level feedback from a stronger teacher, mitigating both the off-policy distribution shift of Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and the sparse credit assignment of Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, standard OPD faces two coupled limitations. First, it requires direct access to the teacher's token-level logits, excluding a broad class of capable proprietary models from serving as teachers. Second, the token-level logit signal itself is brittle, depending on a narrow overlap of plausible next tokens between teacher and student, and prone to amplifying degenerate patterns such as repetition loops. In this paper, we introduce OmniOPD, a novel framework that addresses both limitations through a logit-free, chunk-level supervision signal. OmniOPD replaces deterministic logit matching with Monte Carlo rollouts that approximate the teacher's local preferences through a continuous semantic similarity metric over multi-token chunks, and concentrates this supervision via a peak-entropy scheduler that audits the student only at its high-uncertainty reasoning forks. A Dirichlet-Multinomial Bayesian prior and a base-model KL anchor further bound the variance of discrete sampling and prevent policy collapse across unaudited tokens. Across competitive benchmarks, OmniOPD surpasses the standard OPD approach by up to +28.64% on math, confirming that chunk-level semantic verification extracts a more reliable learning signal than token-level logit matching, whose high information density is offset by significant noise and brittleness. Furthermore, when paired with stronger black-box teachers such as Claude-4.5-Haiku and Gemini-2.5-Flash, OmniOPD achieves an additional +9.54% relative on math over its open-weight teacher counterpart, advancing the student past the performance of self-exploratory RL.

AI.tldr: OmniOPD提出了一种无需logits的、基于块级语义验证的知识蒸馏框架，通过蒙特卡洛 rollout 和峰值熵调度器，在数学任务上比标准OPD提升高达+28.64%，且能与黑盒教师模型（如Claude-4.5-Haiku）配合，进一步超越自我探索RL的性能。
AI.motivation: 标准On-Policy Distillation存在两个耦合局限：一是需要直接访问教师的token级logits，无法使用闭源专有模型作为教师；二是token级logit信号本身脆弱，依赖师生模型对下一个token的狭窄重叠，容易放大重复循环等退化模式。
AI.method: 提出OmniOPD框架，用蒙特卡洛 rollout 替代确定性logit匹配，通过多token块上的连续语义相似度度量近似教师局部偏好；使用峰值熵调度器仅在学生高不确定性的推理分支处进行监督；引入Dirichlet-Multinomial贝叶斯先验和基模型KL锚点，约束离散采样的方差，防止未监督token上的策略崩溃。
AI.result: 在竞争性基准测试中，OmniOPD在数学任务上超越标准OPD最高达+28.64%；与更强的黑盒教师（Claude-4.5-Haiku、Gemini-2.5-Flash）搭配时，数学任务相对提升+9.54%，学生性能超越自我探索RL。
AI.conclusion: 块级语义验证比token级logit匹配提取到更可靠的学习信号，后者尽管信息密度高但噪声和脆弱性也显著。OmniOPD有效解决了标准OPD的两个关键局限，拓展了知识蒸馏的适用范围和性能上限。

title: PlatonicNav: Unveiling Semantic Correspondence in Navigation with Platonic Topological Maps
summary: Embodied visual navigation, where an agent perceives a complex environment and acts to reach a goal from raw sensory input, underpins a wide range of applications such as household service robotics, assistive robotics, and large-scale autonomous exploration. However, recent attempts to unify vision-and-language navigation (VLN) and object goal navigation (ObjNav) remain at the level of architectural fusion, mixed-task training, and large vision-language pretraining, without examining whether independently trained vision and language encoders may already share a common semantic structure. Moreover, even object-centric topological maps still ground language goals through explicit cross-modal supervision such as CLIP or large vision-language models, leaving open whether such grounding is possible from a purely vision-built map. To address these challenges, we extend the Platonic Representation Hypothesis to embodied navigation and recast vision-only ObjNav, cross-modal ObjNav, and VLN as three different interfaces to the same object-centric semantic manifold. We further introduce PlatonicNav, a training-free framework whose Platonic Topological Map fuses geometric and semantic node distances from a self-supervised visual encoder, and grounds language goals via blind matching without any paired vision-language data.
